verse_text: You shall not eat anything that dies of itself; you may give it to the alien in your cities that he may eat it, or you may sell it to a foreigner; for you are a holy people to the Lord your God. You shall not boil a lamb in its mother's milk.

links.context: The bread of the Gentiles is described in [[DEU.14:3]]-21 as unclean food for the people of God.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
